prompt: A moody minimalist portrait of a young man in a formal black suit, white dress shirt, and black tie, standing against a plain light beige wall in warm late-afternoon sunlight. He is shown from the chest up, slightly angled, with his face mostly obscured by shadow and framing, emphasizing the jawline, neck, ear, and tousled short black hair. In one hand he delicately holds exactly 1 long-stemmed red rose with 1 bloom and a few small green leaves, positioned beside his chest. Strong directional golden light from the left casts a crisp shadow of both the man and the rose onto the wall, creating a cinematic romantic atmosphere. Clean editorial photography, soft natural skin tones, high contrast between the dark suit and sunlit wall, shallow luxury fashion aesthetic, centered composition, realistic photo style.
